name: ChatGPT
description: Listen to ChatGPT responses hands-free using Voq's text-to-speech for Chrome.
metaDescription: Use Voq to read ChatGPT responses aloud. Free Chrome extension — no account needed. Works on chat.openai.com.
steps: Install Voq from the Chrome Web Store (free, no account required).
Open ChatGPT at chat.openai.com and start or open a conversation.
When a response appears, select the text you want to hear.
Click the Voq icon in your Chrome toolbar, or right-click and choose 'Read with Voq'.
Voq opens a reading panel and begins reading aloud, highlighting each word as it is spoken.
Use the playback controls to pause, resume, or adjust the reading speed.
